Contact Us

Last updated: June 30, 2026

This page is part of our commitment to being transparent about how SendAFun works. For urgent questions email the team directly — we reply within 24 hours, 7 days a week.

Customer & Billing Support

Primary support email (Creem & billing)
✉️ support@sendafun.com
Replies within 24 hours, 7 days a week. 90% answered in < 4 hours during UK business hours.
Privacy, Legal & DMCA takedowns
legal@sendafun.com

Partnerships, Press & Template Requests
press@sendafun.com

General enquiries
hello@sendafun.com

Response Times & Hours

Card delivery is fully automated 24 hours a day, 365 days a year — scheduled deliveries always go out at the correct time in your timezone.

Human support: Monday–Sunday 9:00–20:00 GMT.
Urgent billing/delivery issues: we respond within 2 hours, even on weekends and bank holidays.

For the fastest reply, write from the email address you used when you paid and include your order reference if you have one.

Before You Contact Us — Common Answers

Most questions are already answered in the links below — they are often faster than email.

👉 FAQ — 20 common questions answered (pricing, delivery, refunds, scheduling)
👉 Refund Policy (Terms §4) — 72-hour single-card refunds, 14-day annual refunds
👉 Privacy Policy — what data we collect, how to request deletion
👉 Cookie Policy — cookie categories, vendor list, how to opt out
👉 Pricing — single-card, monthly, and annual plans compared

Mailing Address

SendAFun Ltd.
8 Hill Street, Suite 204
Douglas, Isle of Man
IM1 2EU

Please do not mail physical cards or cheques to this address — we operate entirely digitally. Use our email addresses above instead.

© 2026 sendafun.com  |  Privacy Policy  |  Terms of Service  |  Contact: support@sendafun.com
🍪 We use cookies
Essential cookies keep the card editor working. Analytics and advertising cookies help us improve the site and show relevant ads, and are only set after you accept. Read the Privacy Policy or Cookie Policy for details.
